steps.title: Separate the two clauses
steps.content: The first independent clause says the sculptures challenge viewers to consider their relationships to material wastes. The second independent clause says her works in the 2008 exhibition were no different. Those clauses need a strong boundary.

steps.title: Avoid weak or missing joins
steps.content: Choice B turns the second clause into an awkward fragment. Choice C creates a comma splice between independent clauses. Choice D gives the clauses no punctuation at all. The answer is A.
